allocationTypes.title: Allocation types
allocationTypes.description: Define the energy management strategy that will be applied in each interval, according to the level of control and dynamism required by your operation.
allocationTypes.protectedStartDesc: Restricts the start of new charges when the maximum power of the interval is compromised.
allocationTypes.equalShareDesc: Distributes the maximum power of the interval equally among all active charges, adjusting dynamically.
allocationTypes.loadPlanDesc: Prioritizes power allocation according to each vehicle's load plan (SoC, required energy and target time).

powerIntervals.title: Power time intervals
powerIntervals.description: Define date ranges and schedules in which maximum power will be applied according to the selected allocation type.
powerIntervals.footnote: Note: Any unplanned time range will use the maximum available power.
